title: Use ranked frontier candidates before queue insertion
summary: Recursive traversal now consumes structured link candidates with scores, dedupe, and diversity caps instead of raw first-seen URLs.

title: Propagate host-aware saved paths through output and replay
summary: Recursive registrable-domain crawls now preserve host-prefixed HTML paths so multi-host roots no longer collide during save, rewrite, or replay.

title: Recover failed critical assets into a dedicated lane
summary: Failed same-site images, CSS, fonts, and script chunks can be retried outside the browser lane and recorded as `captureLane: recovery` in the resource manifest.

title: Preserve charset and decoded text during network capture
summary: Network capture now retains encoding hints and decoded text for HTML, CSS, and text-like responses so replay diagnostics are less sensitive to encoding drift.

title: Fall back to regex rewriting when PostCSS parsing fails
summary: CSS processing now keeps import and asset URL rewriting alive when malformed third-party stylesheets cannot be parsed safely by PostCSS.

title: Replay verifier should use structural route and marker checks
summary: Replay verification now resolves nested HTML paths and favors route reachability, title parity, and marker overlap over simple body-length comparisons.
